Count Down

-rocket ship taking off
-new years fireworks


-doomsday clock
-the clock of the real world that is counting closer to midnight
-you have just been elected as president and have to solve world problems so that the timer doesn't reach midnight
-kind of like a roguelike
-hiring and firing employees
-dropping bombs
-actions have upsdies or consequence
-conversations with world leaders
-wars
-climate crisis

-countdown rts rougelike
-basically there is a small world every stage and the goal is to either defeat every enemy in a specific stage or find something etc etc
-you start with a certain amount of time (ex 60 turns) and every tick, blocks start disappears from a specific point on the map
-in between turns there is shops, upgrade relics/enchantments
-items can improve time per round
-cursed can remove time
-you can buy time with your sould as a last resort
long range / short range weapons, knockbock, status effects

-Y2K
-counting down to the "end of the world"
-more story driven

-ten seconds ahead
-you see things in the world as they will be ten seconds in the future
-puzzle game
-you can rewind time to see nearer in the future
-predict enemy movements
-prepare traps

-"the machine"
-30 minutes to death
-there is a machine on your base on mars keeping everyone alive
-there is a malfunction that causes it to lose its energy reserves and everyone will die in 30 minutes if you dont find a way to power it
-kinf of like factorio you need to automate energy by ex mine coal -> blast furnace -> crusher -> machine

-two scenes, game scene and menu scene
inspired by into the breach, factorio, and rain world (mix of graphics and not pixel perfect effects






-rts roguelike
-you assign attacks to 4 different slots
-each attack/ability has a value associated with it and this value counts down over and over again for attacks
-you must defeat all enemies in a round using your abilities
-for example, the sword attack happens every 5 turns, block is eveyr 9 turns etc etc
